# MySQL Transactions Submodule (Chinese Source)

> English llms.txt for files under `docs/zh/mysql/transactions`.

## Docs

- [Transactions Overview](../transactions.mdx): Root-level topic overview for transaction boundaries, locking, and deadlock diagnosis.
- [Locking Mechanisms](./locking-mechanisms.mdx): Isolation choices, lock conflicts, deadlock analysis, and mitigation strategies.
- [Transactions Sidebar Metadata](./_meta.json): Navigation metadata for the transactions submodule.
- [This LLMs File](./llms.txt): Machine-readable index for this transactions directory.
